About 01

What
I Do

I help brands create impactful visuals for social media, marketing campaigns, and product launches. My work focuses on Video editing, Graphic design, Motion graphics, and engaging digital content that helps brands capture attention and grow online.

Based in Nepal, available for international collaboration. Modern digital design style meets fast communication and flexible workflow.
